title: Fix clippy doc-formatting lint (doc_lazy_continuation) in github.rs
action: Fix 3 clippy::doc_lazy_continuation lint errors in src/update/github.rs (from `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`, caught by the wave-close full verify chain). Each error is a doc-comment paragraph sentence that directly follows a markdown bullet-list line without a blank `///` line separating them, which clippy parses as an unindented list continuation. Fix by inserting a blank `///` line between the bullet list and the trailing paragraph sentence in: (1) the doc comment above `resolve_asset_urls` (around line 128-129, the 'Pure over an already-fetched asset list...' sentence), and (2) the doc comment above `verify_checksum` (around line 149, the '...branch is unit-testable with fixtures and no network.' sentence, which is also a continuation of the same list-item line ending '(D8).' -- split that sentence onto its own paragraph too if needed so the list item ends cleanly at '(D8).' and the following sentence starts as a new paragraph after a blank `///` line). Purely doc-comment/formatting fix -- no logic or test changes. Then run `cargo fmt --all` too in case reflow shifts anything.

prohibitions: No logic or test behavior changes -- doc comments and formatting only
No changes to any file other than src/update/github.rs

verify: cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --all --check && cargo test --quiet update

trace.outcome: Fixed clippy doc_lazy_continuation lints in src/update/github.rs by adding blank doc comment lines to separate bullet lists from trailing paragraphs.
trace.verify_output: Compiling herdr-go v0.1.2, Finished in 0.98s. All checks pass: clippy clean, fmt check passes, 25 update tests pass.
trace.verify_command: cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --all --check && cargo test --quiet update
